story.text:
# 💡 C81 · Existence-Leak
**concept** · shared · knowledge

A ZK proof of feasibility leaks an upper bound on reconstruction difficulty; I(feasibility; method) > 0, measured in the wild. Active (70% · PROMOTED Run 3: Schrottenloher 2026-06-02 instance + Garg-Jain-Sahai impossibility as bookends).
